title: phyllorkis oligoglossa
intro: Phyllorkis oligoglossa, also known as the "Tongue Orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllorkis oligoglossa are said to include the relief of pain, reduction of fever, and improvement of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
